,{\"category_id\":495,\"name\":\"四合院\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495\u0026name=四合院\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":538,\"name\":\"同人\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538\u0026name=同人\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7613237155388719678","read_count":"56671","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"175436"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"77","tags":"男频衍生,系统,重生,四合院,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2873a176ac3d60e99abb37bde8a549d3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779454391\u0026x-signature=3%2FaSdrePZcIiZfa2v8XNYTfh%2Fkg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2994690995262963","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"76"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323205310B21D61D42B42AD777B53\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16880,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34067,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":935},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614398080223281945","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一心为公，公帑的公！二两一盅，三杯不倒。四杯超标，五更爬起。六神无主，七上八下。久久不能，十分霸气。都说黑红也是红，为啥我就红不起来，难道我还不够黑，难道要我再晒黑一点？挑个事端出来，制造一点热度，看看能不能红。嘿嘿！各位看官，觉得本书还不错的，敬请打个分，一星不怕，五星最好，作者虽然写作很水，起码还是用了点力气的！谢谢大家了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772868540,"group_id":"7613235937127959614","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我如人间一幽魂，偷得浮生半
